{{Quote|Etsero is desperate and fearful of death, the fate that certainly awaits him if he fails to come up with the vigorish every month.|[[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]]|<ref name="WBC" />}}
'''Etsero''' was an [[Adnerem]] [[Gangster/Legends|gangster]] who ran the largest [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] house on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Adner]], ''[[The Red Lisken]]''. Although successful at first, Etsero soon found himself in debt to several people, including [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. To raise the money needed to pay his creditors, Etsero began regularly cheating his customers. After the [[Death/Legends|death]] of Jabba and the imprisonment of several creditors, Etsero believed his problems were over until he found out that the debts had been transferred to a third party with [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] sympathies. ''The Red Lisken'' was soon laundering [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] for the Empire.<ref name="WBC" />

He was a known associate of [[Theol Dunoche]].<ref name="ND">[[No Disintegrations (West End Games)|''No Disintegrations'']]</ref>
